name: LINKBANCORP, Inc.
summary: LINKBANCORP, Inc. operates as the bank holding company for LINKBANK that provides personal and business banking products and services in Pennsylvania. The company offers checking and savings accounts; small business, term, auto, and real estate loans, as well as lines of credit; and treasury management services such as, remote deposit capture, ACH collection and disbursement, merchant, and wire transfer. It also provides convenience services, including ATMs, debit cards, online and mobile banking, bill pay, card valet, and e-statements. The company was founded in 2018 and is based in Camp Hill, Pennsylvania.
